name: empty-avatar-group
visual_summary: The empty-avatar-group component is a container element that can hold a group of avatars, typically displaying the number of members in a team or group without showing the actual avatars. This component is often used in social media platforms, group chats, or community forums. When a developer would choose to use this component, they are looking for a space-saving way to represent a group of users with a dynamic count.
generation_prompt:
